meaning: n. 时期, 局面, 方面, 位相, 相, 阶段\nvt. 使调整相位, 使定相, 使一致, 逐步执行, 实行\n[计] 阶段
example: - The project is currently in its final phase before launch.

meaning: n. 植物, 作物, 工厂, 树枝, 生长, 设施, 成套设备\nvt. 种植, 栽培, 播种, 培养, 安置, 殖民于, 使位于\nvi. 种植
example: - The government has introduced strict regulations to reduce emissions from every major industrial plant.

meaning: n. 行星, 命运星辰, 杰出的人, 重大影响的事
example: - The discovery of an Earth-like planet in the habitable zone has reignited debates about extraterrestrial life.

meaning: n. 池塘\nv. 筑成池塘
example: - The children fed ducks by the tranquil pond in the botanical garden.

meaning: n. 罗马教皇, 主教
example: - The Pope announced a new encyclical on climate change during his address at the Vatican.

meaning: n. 门廊, 走廊
example: - She sat on the porch sipping tea and watching the sunset.

meaning: n. 鸽子, 易上当受骗的人, 年轻女子
example: - The pigeon cooed softly on the windowsill, oblivious to the bustling city below.

meaning: n. 旅行者, 朝圣者, 香客\nvi. 朝圣
example: - The pilgrim walked hundreds of miles to reach the ancient temple.

meaning: n. 交易, 办理, 学报, 和解协议\n[计] 事务处理
example: - The bank charges a fee for each financial transaction.

meaning: vt. 超越, 胜过
example: - Her intellectual curiosity transcends disciplinary boundaries, enabling groundbreaking interdisciplinary research.

meaning: vt. 使转换, 改变, 改造, 使...变形\nvi. 改变, 转化, 变换\n[计] 变换
example: - The digital revolution has transformed the way we communicate and access information.

meaning: n. 瞬, 短期居留者, 过境鸟, 瞬变现象\na. 短暂的, 易变的, 瞬变的, 路过的\n[计] 瞬变过程; 过渡过程; 过渡的; 瞬变的; 瞬时峰值电压
example: - The joy of victory was a transient feeling that faded within hours.

meaning: n. 晶体管\n[化] 晶体管
example: - The invention of the transistor revolutionized electronics, replacing bulky vacuum tubes in most applications.

meaning: n. 经过, 通行, 运输, 运输线, 转变\nvt. 运送, 使通过, 经过\nvi. 通过
example: - The new high-speed rail line has significantly reduced transit time between major cities.

root: trans(跨越)+it(走)+ion(名词)→跨越走的状态→过渡
meaning: n. 转变, 转换, 变迁, 过渡时期, 临时转调\n[化] 跃迁
example: - The country is undergoing a difficult political transition after the collapse of the authoritarian regime.

root: trans(跨越)+miss(发送)+ion(名词)→跨越发送→传输
meaning: n. 传输, 传送, 变速器\n[计] 传输
example: - The transmission of digital signals over fiber-optic cables enables high-speed internet access.

meaning: n. 耸肩\nv. 耸肩
example: - She shrugged and said, 'I have no idea why the policy changed.'

meaning: n. 水泥, 胶结剂\nvt. 胶合, 用水泥涂\nvi. 黏牢
example: - The construction team used high-strength cement to reinforce the bridge's foundation.

meaning: n. 胶, 粘性物\nvt. 粘合, 胶合
example: - The broken vase was carefully repaired with strong glue.

root: tim(害怕)+id(形容词后缀)→胆小的
meaning: a. 胆小的, 羞怯的
example: - She gave a timid smile when asked to present her research in front of the faculty.

meaning: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的
example: - I'm glad to hear that you've been accepted to the graduate program.

root: con(一起)+tribut(给予)+ion(名词)→一起给予→贡献
meaning: n. 捐助, 捐助之物, 贡献\n[经] 贡献, 捐款, 补助品
example: - Her contribution to the research paper was acknowledged in the acknowledgements section.

root: tact(接触)+ic(形容词)→接触的→战术的
meaning: n. 一项战术, 一条策略\na. 战术的, 顺序的, 排列的
example: - The company adopted a new marketing tactic to increase brand awareness among young consumers.

meaning: n. 洋娃娃, 无头脑的美丽女人
example: - She collected antique porcelain dolls from the 19th century.

meaning: a. 尚未被人碰过的, 原封不动的, 完整的\n[医] 完整的, 无伤的
example: - The ancient manuscript was found intact after centuries buried underground.

root: fisc(国库)+al(形容词)→国库的→财政的
meaning: a. 财政的, 国库的\n[经] 财政上的, 会计的, 国库的
example: - The government announced new fiscal policies to curb inflation.

meaning: 评估，评价；估算
example: - Teachers need to assess student progress regularly.

root: mut(改变)+ual(形容词)→改变的→相互的
meaning: a. 相互的, 共有的\n[经] 相互的
example: - The two countries have established mutual respect and cooperation in trade.

root: re(加强)+lat(携带)+ivity(名词)→携带关系→相对性
meaning: n. 有关系, 相关性, 相对性\n[化] 相对性
example: - Einstein's theory of relativity revolutionized our understanding of space, time, and gravity.

meaning: n. 居民, 常驻程序, 居住者, 留鸟\na. 居留的, 定居的
example: - As a long-term resident of Beijing, she is deeply familiar with the city's cultural heritage.

meaning: n. 水滴\nv. (使)滴下
example: - The constant drip of the leaky faucet kept her awake all night.

meaning: n. 闪烁, 闪耀, 瞬息\nvi. 闪烁\nvt. 使闪耀
example: - Her eyes twinkled with amusement as she heard the witty remark.

meaning: n. 卡片, 纸牌, 节目单, 明信片, 梳棉机\nvt. 备置卡片, 记于卡片上, 梳理\n[计] 卡片, 卡
example: - She presented her university ID card at the library entrance.

meaning: n. 隔离, 封锁交通, 检疫期\nvt. 隔离, 排斥
example: - All travelers arriving from high-risk countries must undergo a 14-day quarantine upon entry.

meaning: vt. 收割, 收获, 获得\nvi. 收割, 得到报应
example: - Farmers reap wheat in late summer after months of careful cultivation.

meaning: n. 工场, 车间, 研讨会\n[计] 讨论会; 专题研究组
example: - The university hosted a workshop on academic writing to help graduate students improve their research paper skills.

meaning: n. 大厅, 休息室, 游说议员者\nvi. 游说议员, 游说\nvt. 游说
example: - The delegates gathered in the lobby before the parliamentary session began.

meaning: v. 抱怨, 抗议, 控诉
example: - Many students complained about the excessive workload and lack of feedback from professors.

meaning:
n. 舰队, 港湾, 小河
a. 快速的, 敏捷的, 浅的, 短暂的
adv. 浅
vi. 疾驰, 飞逝, 掠过
vt. 消磨, 变换船(或船员)的位置
example: - The navy deployed its entire fleet to the South China Sea for joint exercises.

root: em(加强)+pha(说)+ise(动词)→加强说→强调
meaning: vt. 强调, 重读, 加强...的语气, 着重
example: - The professor emphasised the need for rigorous methodology in empirical research.

meaning: n. 酱油, 调味汁, 酱\nvt. 给...调味, 使增加趣味
example: - She drizzled a rich tomato sauce over the pasta to add depth and complexity.

meaning: n. 丑闻, 中伤, 耻辱, 反感, 流言蜚语\n[法] 丑事, 丑闻, 干丑事的人
example: - The minister resigned after the financial scandal came to light.

root: ac(加强)+quaint(知道)→使知道→使了解
meaning: vt. 使认识, 介绍
example: - She acquainted him with the company's policies during orientation.

root: 词根不确定，可能源自拟声或古法语
meaning: n. 垃圾, 废物\nvt. 丢弃
example: - The city has implemented a new recycling program to reduce the amount of trash sent to landfills.

meaning: n. 慈悲, 博爱, 慈善团体, 施舍\n[法] 宽大, 宽恕, 慈善机关
example: - Her lifelong commitment to charity earned her widespread respect among humanitarian circles.

meaning:
n. 偏见, 斜纹
a. 偏斜的
adv. 偏斜
vt. 使有偏见
[计] 偏流; 偏压; 偏磁; 偏离
example: - Media coverage often reflects the political bias of its owners.

root: favor(喜爱)+able(形容词)→喜爱的→有利的
meaning: a. 有利的, 赞许的, 良好的
example: - The economic data released last quarter was highly favorable, boosting investor confidence.

meaning: n. 倾斜, 斜坡, 斜面\nvt. 使倾向于, 使倾斜\nvi. 倾向, 倾斜, 爱好, 易于
example: - The hikers struggled up the steep incline as the trail wound through the mountains.

meaning: n. 影响, 病, 喜爱, 情感, 倾向\n[医] 疾患, 病变, 病; 感情
example: - She showed great affection for her grandmother, always visiting her on weekends.

meaning: adv. 在旁边, 靠拢着\nprep. 在...旁边, 与...在一起
example: - The new policy was introduced alongside stricter environmental regulations.
